title: Norwegian Pancake Delight
description: A delicious and sweet pancake recipe inspired by Norwegian cuisine, perfect for a family breakfast or brunch.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, norwegian mix, and sugar.
Add eggs and melted butter to the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Gradually add the buttermilk, stirring until the batter is smooth.
Add torn bread pieces and stir until they are evenly distributed throughout the batter.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the skillet or griddle.
Cook the pancakes for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the pancakes and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes warm with your favorite toppings, such as syrup, fresh fruit, or whipped cream.
